explanation.one: As production complexity increased and deadlines tightened, the need for efficient teamwork became more crucial. The growing amount of data to manage made it harder to deliver high-quality movies, often keeping people late at night. That's why we decided to put an end to this. We wake up every morning with one goal: to help you deliver high-end visuals while keeping the process enjoyable.
explanation.two: To achieve this, we reimagined communication both inside and outside the studio. Internally, we transformed the production tracker into a collaborative platform where all stakeholders can share information in real time and become more autonomous. Externally, we enabled talents from different studios to connect and grow their skills together.
explanation.three: Through our solutions, artists can collaborate effortlessly with teams and can focus on their craft, developing their skills and reaching new heights. Meanwhile, studios can scale seamlessly, unleashing their potential and fulfilling their ambitions.

one.title: Simplicity
one.text: The lighter our tools, the more agile we become. It clears our minds and speeds everything up.

two.title: Collaboration
two.text: When ideas and work are shared, everyone wins. We learn faster and achieve more.

three.title: Craftsmanship
three.text: Well-made things last longer. When they are a joy to work on, it leads to better software.

one.title: Open Company
one.text: We share most of what we build and learn. We have also made our KPIs public.

two.title: Remote
two.text: We work from where we want when we want. Only productivity matters.

three.title: Deliberate Practicing
three.text: We always need to learn. That's why we dedicate one day a week to self-training.

team.title: Who we are
team.intro: We are a passionate team based in France with extensive experience in software development, production management, and product development.

design.title: Website illustrations
design.information: All artworks are created by the Naolito Studio and Ev Style. They are licensed under Creative Commons by-nc-sa.

blender.information: All production images shown in screenshots were created by Blender Studio during the production of Sprite Fright. They are licensed under Creative Commons.

carbonReport.title: Carbon Report
carbonReport.subtitle: Our environmental footprint
carbonReport.explanationOne: At CGWire, we measured the real impact of our activity on the environment. This 2024 report highlights our main emission posts, our progress margins, and the concrete actions we are committed to to reduce our footprint.

consumption.title: Our carbon consumption
consumption.explanation: Our business trips by plane represent 50% of our total emissions. To better observe the distribution of other categories, you can remove them from the calculations.

categories.title: Our breakdown by categories
categories.explanation: The results show the distribution of our emissions, with the transport with the trip to Japan representing more than 50% of our total emissions.

evolution.title: Our evolution tracks to reduce our impact
evolution.cloudTwo: Reduce the weight of media (images, videos, etc.)
evolution.cloudThree: Prefer French servers powered by low-carbon energy
evolution.foodOne: Reduce plane trips to the strict minimum
evolution.foodTwo: Responsible catering: encourage employees to eat vegetarian more often
evolution.foodThree: Prefer high-quality equipment for longer conservation

anticipation.title: Our projects for 2026: Anticipate to reduce our impact
anticipation.warning: +57% potential emissions in 2026 if no action is taken

conclusion.title: We are a company in the cultural and creative industries sector
conclusion.explanation: We allow studios to collaborate better to deliver better results. To make this contribution sustainable, we strive to apply the best practices of community life on all fronts: open-source software, transparent accounting, and environmental impact analysis. The goal is to include our company as much as possible in our society and our environment.

community.subtitle: Join your peers
community.explanationOne: As we progressed in building CGWire, we increasingly felt the need to enhance collaboration between studios. That's why we have fostered both online and offline communities of animation professionals. Topics extend beyond just Kitsu. TDs and production managers share tips and best practices to tackle their day-to-day challenges. Below, you'll find the platform we use to connect with our community.

chat.subtitle: Discord
chat.title: Connect with your peers
chat.explanation: Join our Discord channel. Industry professionals share and exchange best practices about Kitsu and animation/VFX pipelines!

github.subtitle: Github
github.title: Contribute to Kitsu
github.explanation: Post bug reports or feature requests on our GitHub repositories. See how we code, participate in architecture discussions, and even better, send your pull requests!

feedback.subtitle: Canny
feedback.title: Give feedback
feedback.explanation: Post feedback and comments. Vote for existing feature requests. See what is under development and help shape the future of Kitsu with the community.

translate.subtitle: POEditor
translate.title: Translate Kitsu
translate.explanation: Kitsu is already available in 6 languages. With your help, we can go further. Translate Kitsu in your language and allow more people to access our open-source technologies.

main.title: We Connect Creative Minds
main.subtitle: CGWire develops Kitsu, a platform for animation, VFX, and video game studios that brings teams and tools together in a single place. Collaborate, manage deliveries, and perform reviews from anywhere.
main.tagline: Elevate Your Productions To The Next Level

explanation.one: With Kitsu, you can enable efficient collaboration between distributed teams, whether in the studio or from home. This results in better decision-making and faster deliveries.

text.one: Receive up-to-date information on your production's progress, allowing you to assign tasks and provide efficient feedback, keeping your team on track.
text.two: Your content is stored securely and will always be accessible to your team and throughout your pipeline. Everyone knows what to do, whether in the studio or from home.
text.three: Streamlined and intuitive software is quicker to use and easier to get started with. With Kitsu, you can start your projects without the need for a consultant or intensive training.
text.four: Kitsu saves time and increases efficiency. Once integrated into your pipeline, it supercharges your studio. Managing productions is easier than ever!

conclusion.tagline: Harnessing our technical expertise to empower your creativity
conclusion.text: CGWire's software is open source and developed in collaboration with studios. All features and functionality have been validated through real-life use cases.

scale.forecastText: Test scenarios and see how your production evolves.
scale.todosText: Empower your artists with efficient to-do lists.
scale.reviewsText: Conduct reviews for each delivery and compare different versions.
scale.reportsText: Have a 360° view on your productions and stay in control.
scale.apiText: Integrate production data into your pipeline.
scale.storiesText: Discover how studios have used our products to enhance collaboration and successfully complete productions.

stats.title: Trusted by 300+ studios
stats.text: Creatives from all over the world use Kitsu to manage their productions.

kitsu.title: Give Superpowers To Your Teams
kitsu.description: Kitsu is a collaboration platform for animation, VFX, and game studios. It empowers your teams to deliver higher-quality content.

modules.subtitle: Designed with production use cases in mind

2d.title: Kitsu for 2D Animation
2d.content: 2D Animation productions require to deliver a lot of shots in a short amount of time while keeping a high quality. With Kitsu, you can schedule, dispatch and review your shots easily. That way, you can deliver your best work on time.

3d.title: Kitsu for 3D Animation
3d.content: 3D Animation productions require to deliver complex shots involving a lot of assets and iterations. With Kitsu, you can clarify the chaos. Your teams can focus on delivering the best work possible.

vfx.title: Kitsu for VFX
vfx.content: VFX productions involves a lot of modified shots requiring many iterations and handled by distributed teams. With Kitsu, you can organize your production in a way to avoid any confusion and waste of time. Your teams can be fully productive.

games.title: Kitsu for Video Games
games.content: Video Games productions require to deal with a lot of in-game assets while creating cinematics. Artists are hired all around the world and need to be able to collaborate easily. With Kitsu, it's easy to keep track of all the assets and iterations and make sure everyone is on the same page.

schools.title: Kitsu for Schools
schools.content: Schools needs to create a bridge between the school and the studios. With Kitsu, students can work on their projects in a frame similar to the industry. They can express their artistic vision while being team players. Teachers can follow their progress and provide feedback efficiently.

services.subtitle: An outstanding user experience
services.title: Robust services to support your production
services.description: A production database thrives with the right support. Our industry-experienced support team is always there for you, ensuring everything runs smoothly and securely.

stories.subtitle: Testimonials
stories.title: Read our customer stories
stories.description: See how our customers implemented Kitsu in their studios for any kind of productions.

kitsu-submit.title: Join the Future of Production Collaboration

hero.title: Join the Future of Production Collaboration

about.title: About Kitsu Summit 2026
about.description: The first-ever Kitsu Summit brings together production professionals, technical directors, and studio managers to share their experiences using Kitsu for animation and video game production.

conferences.title: Conference Program
conferences.description: 12 inspiring presentations from industry leaders showcasing real-world implementations of Kitsu across different production types. In addition, there will be two keynote speeches from the founders of Kitsu.

schedule.title: Conference Schedule
schedule.description: Plan your day with our detailed schedule of conferences

registration.title: Secure Your Spot
registration.description: Join us for an unforgettable day of learning, networking, and discovering the future of production collaboration.

food.title: Catering
food.note: The food will be served by Marie Julien Cuisine. It will feature a selection of gourmet dishes, including vegetarian options.

access.title: How To Access The Venue
access.description: The venue is located in the heart of Paris, close to the Gare de l'Est and the Gare du Nord. It is easily accessible by public transport.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Production?
cta.description: Don't miss this unique opportunity to learn from the best and connect with your industry peers.

pricing.title: Kitsu Cloud plans for studios of all sizes

kitsu.subtitle: Connect your teams and tools
kitsu.title: Kitsu Cloud plans for studios of all sizes

cloud.explanation: We provide a cloud installation with user support, trainings, extra features, plugins deployment, and contractor synchronization.

usecase.agency: For shorts, commercials, and light productions
usecase.production: For TV series, feature films, and video games
usecase.partner: For large studios or TPN compliance

discount.details: All plans come with a two weeks trial

school.title: Pricing For Schools
school.details: We offer a unique price of 3999€ a year for Artist Schools (up to 100 students).

header.subtitle: Connect all your tools
header.metrics: More than 200 000 assets have been managed with Kitsu!
header.explanation: Your data flows throughout your entire pipeline. That's why we provide integrations to facilitate communication between your tools. We enable your artists to publish from their tools, allow your team to send notifications to your chat applications, and offer API clients for extending your workflow.

integrations.titleDcc: Publish from your Favorite Digital Content Creation Tools
integrations.subtitleChats: Keep your team up to date
integrations.titleChats: Push notifications to your chat applications
integrations.subtitleSoftware: Access Kitsu data in your tools
integrations.titleSoftware: Integrate Kitsu directly into Your Code

spreadsheets.title: Build your workflow with our spreadsheets

spreadsheets.tagline: Build your workflow with our spreadsheets
spreadsheets.explanationOne: We understand that you are accustomed to spreadsheets and that transitioning to a new tool can be challenging. Even if you are not ready to use Kitsu, we want to assist you. That's why we've prepared production-ready spreadsheets for you. You can use them as a starting point to build your workflow or keep them throughout your production. Everything is free and licensed under Creative Commons BY-NC-SA 2.0. Enjoy!

header.subtitle: Set and share your breakdowns
header.metrics: More than 200 000 assets have been managed with Kitsu!
header.explanation: Create breakdowns and access casting information from anywhere. Add as many asset occurrences as needed and record relevant metadata. This way, you'll know when your shots are ready to be built.

features.title: List your breakdown
features.subtitle: Link assets to shots
features.content: Build breakdown tables showing the casted assets for each shot, organized by type. Add metadata directly to every shot, providing information for your scene builder.

features.title: Link assets together
features.subtitle: Set populating
features.content: Connect assets for specific representation. Populate sets, link props to characters, or anything fitting your workflow.

features.title: Export your casting
features.subtitle: CSV files and API
features.content: Export all casting information as a flat .csv file or a column representation. Connect your tools to our API to enhance your scene builder.

header.subtitle: Your data is always available and secure
header.explanation: Our operation team provides you with the highest standards of the cloud industry. With decades of experience, we ensure that your installation is always up and that your data are always secured. All our installations are safely isolated ensuring performance and confidentiality.

features.title: Keep your data secure
features.subtitle: SSL, Secret Management, Restricted Access
features.content: We adhere to the highest security standards, using only secure transmissions for accessing our up-to-date installations. All secrets are managed through secure vaults, and our employees are screened. A security document is available upon request.

features.title: Your Kitsu is always up
features.subtitle: 99% uptime
features.content: We closely monitor all activity on your instance and receive alerts for any suspicious or problematic events. This enables us to resolve issues as quickly as possible.

features.title: Fast access to your data
features.subtitle: Speed and reliability
features.content: Your installation is isolated from others and is set up near your location. All videos processing is run on a dedicated machine, allowing you to build large playlists.

header.subtitle: Stay in control and anticipate problems
header.metrics: Over 1,000 productions have already been tracked with Kitsu!
header.explanation: With Kitsu, schedule each task, track time spent, and set quotas. Use indicators to anticipate problems and build clear production reports. Always have an overview of your production, both at a high and granular level.

features.title: Gain a 360° view of your data
features.subtitle: Production reports
features.content: With Kitsu, you can view statistics on your projects progress. It provides high-level reports for a quick overview of what is happening. Exports are available for sending reports to third parties.

features.title: Schedule your work
features.subtitle: Planning
features.content: In the schedule module, you can set the main duration and milestones of your project. This allows you to see resource allocation and plan your production more effectively.

features.title: Set your expectations
features.subtitle: Quotas
features.content: Monitor the productivity of your artists and ensure that no one is blocked. Set productivity goals and ensure quotas are met.

header.subtitle: Provide feedback on every submission
header.metrics: Over 2 000 000 videos were already reviewed with Kitsu!
header.explanation: Create playlists to review your shots and assets consecutively, for yourself or your client. Set up review sessions to provide feedback efficiently. Maintain access to all preview versions to compare with earlier deliveries.

features.title: Review consecutive shots
features.subtitle: Playlists
features.content: Quickly build review playlists and comment on all shots consecutively. You can add comments and annotations directly from the playlist. Share playlists with your clients or review them with your team.

features.title: Compare with any version
features.subtitle: Side by side or overlay
features.content: Compare any preview with an earlier or related version. View them side by side or as a stacked overlay.

features.title: Perform team reviews
features.subtitle: Real-time synchronization
features.content: Review playlists in sync with your team, allowing everyone to view the same footage and stay on the same page.

header.subtitle: A hub for your production
header.metrics: More than 100,000 API calls are made to the Kitsu API every day!
header.explanation: Kitsu exposes an HTTP API that allows you to centralize and access all your data. Your tools connect to it and query the data from your production, enhancing the artists' tools and helping them focus on the artistic side of their work.

features.title: Boost your pipeline
features.subtitle: Automated workflow
features.content: Store your production data in a single place. Synchronize your data, publish previews directly from your tools, and run custom scripts when events occur. Every action can be automated.

features.title: Share your data with the entire studio
features.subtitle: HTTP API
features.content: Building a movie involves a lot of data: assets, shots, casting, task assignments, file locations, and more. All this information must be shared among all departments. The Kitsu API provides central storage for all this data, which can be queried from anywhere.

features.title: Enjoy a simple Python API
features.subtitle: Python client
features.content: Take advantage of intuitive functions to fetch production data. It also offers a raw client to handle more complex requests. An integrated cache system ensures faster response times. The entire package is available on PyPi.org.

header.subtitle: We adapt our setup to meet your studio's needs.
header.explanation: As your studio grows, you may have specific requirements: on-premise installation, Active Directory integration, multi-instances, local object storage, and local video computing clusters. At CGWire, we can configure these customizations on your dedicated hardware. Our operations team will set up the perfect installation for your studio.

features.title: Setup Kitsu on your servers
features.subtitle: On-premise, AD connection
features.content: We can set up Kitsu with all the advantages of the cloud directly on your servers. You can feel secure and benefit from close-proximity servers while enjoying all our services (security, uptime, and performance). Your installation is kept up to date and monitored as if it were in our cloud. Additionally, it can be integrated with your Active Directory.

features.title: Isolate all your productions
features.subtitle: Multi-instances installation
features.content: As a large studio, you may need to keep teams and production data separated from other projects for security and organizational reasons. That's why we offer isolated installations for each production. This way, you can have different pipelines without interfering with other setups.

features.title: Customize Your Installation
features.subtitle: AD Connection, Local Object Storage, Local Video Cluster
features.content: Take the next step by implementing the most advanced cloud technologies on your private servers: object storage, video computing clusters, and monitoring tools. We can set up everything for you and your Kitsu installations.

header.subtitle: Keep everyone connected
header.metrics: More than 5,000,000 comments have already been posted on Kitsu!
header.explanation: Kitsu enhances communication among all stakeholders, simplifying collaboration across different sites and for remote work. Artists know their tasks and can deliver movies and images directly to the Director. Supervisors and Producers stay informed and can easily give instructions.

features.title: Deliver seamlessly
features.subtitle: Tasks, comments and previews
features.content: Assign tasks to artists, who can publish their work in Kitsu for review once completed. Producers, Supervisors, and Directors can iterate directly through the platform. Thanks to our real-time engine, everyone is instantly notified when a change occurs.

features.title: Keep everyone on the same page
features.subtitle: Todos
features.content: Your artists know what is expected of them and can share their progress. This keeps everyone on the same page at all times, allowing artists to be more autonomous and focus more on the their art.

features.title: Never miss anything
features.subtitle: Newsfeed
features.content: Thanks to the news feed, you will never miss any comments or new previews. Everyone in the studio stays informed about ongoing activities, making it easier to anticipate problems.

header.subtitle: We are always here to help you
header.explanation: Benefit from the industry's fastest response time via in-app chat. All discussions are saved and can be supplemented with a ticketing system. Most importantly, you talk with production experts, not chatbots.

features.title: Fast response time
features.subtitle: Fast response-time
features.content: On average we respond in 30 minutes. We are always very reactive and eager to answer your questions whether you are looking for a specific Kitsu menu, or want to discuss workflows.

features.title: Support when you need it
features.subtitle: Chat, screen-sharing, conference
features.content: Our support is easily accessible, whether in-app, via Discord, or Zoom. We are always available to assist you with Kitsu.

features.title: Assisted by experts
features.subtitle: Former production managers
features.content: Our support team consists of production veterans who understand the challenges you face because they've experienced them too. We ensure you utilize Kitsu's full potential and can even collaborate with you to add new features to the software.

ftrack.title: Kitsu compared to Ftrack
ftrack.subtitle: When to use Kitsu and Ftrack

sections.title: Target Audience
content: Ftrack is aimed at large VFX facilities.
Kitsu is designed for smaller animation and VFX studios with distributed teams, especially those involved in productions across multiple studios, with a focus on TV series.
Our features and roadmaps are tailored to meet these distinct needs. Therefore, it’s important to consider this aspect when choosing your production management solution.

sections.title: Resources Needed
content: Ftrack is an expansive toolbox. To get started with Ftrack, you must hire several people dedicated to customizing UIs, and integrating it into your pipeline. You will end up with something tailor-made, but it will require a lot of effort. These developments may also need significant maintenance in the future. Lastly, you will need internal training sessions for your customized version of Ftrack.

In contrast, Kitsu works great right out of the box. All UIs are designed with ease of use in mind, making it easy to get started. Our dedicated support team is available to assist with setup if needed. However, to fully integrate Kitsu with your pipeline and take advantage of its database, you may need a pipeline TD. While Kitsu provides flexibility to define different workflows, it may not be suitable for projects with highly specialized pipelines.

sections.title: Simplicity vs. Comprehensiveness
content: Ftrack is designed to work on any project at a fine-grain level. It's great at adapting to any situation, but it comes with a lot of complexity. As a result, the added time taken to learn and customize the system may counter the benefits gained from it. Moreover, projects that require this level of specificity are rare.

Kitsu focuses on animation and VFX projects. Through close collaboration with hundreds of studios, we have designed a system that is efficient yet flexible enough to adapt to most situations. Our goal is to ensure that everyone in the studio can use Kitsu from day one. While there may be some very specialized use cases that aren't suitable, you can be confident that everyone in the studio will be comfortable with Kitsu.

sections.title: Review Engine
content: Ftrack has a strong review engine that performs well when reviewing high-end shots online. Nevertheless, organising reviews and comparing versions is still challenging.
Kitsu offers a robust playlist system that allows you to view and compare all shots in your database easily in real-time.

sections.title: Security
content: Ftrack qualifies for many security certifications and offers on-premise installations (at an additional cost). However, its code is proprietary, so there is no guarantee that features or functionality might change or break in the future.

Kitsu is open-source and can be fully audited and installed on-premise with very little extra cost. We ensure that your data remains private and secure. We take security very seriously and, while still waiting for certifications, we apply all best practices to keep your data safe.

CGWire engineers have a strong track record in cloud hosting and apply all protocols to ensure the security of your data (HTTPS, strict password management policies, strong SSH key management, background checks, etc.). It is only a matter of time before we qualify for the necessary security certifications.

sections.title: Pricing
content: Kitsu has similar pricing with Ftrack (~25$/user/month).

However, Kitsu offers a much better user experience with tutorials, beautiful UIs, and dedicated support. Because every stakeholder uses it effectively, the return on investment for Kitsu in animation or VFX production is significantly higher.

sections.title: Documentation
content: Ftrack provides documentation about its usage and its Python client.

Kitsu offers easy-to-follow documentation, a search engine, and tutorial videos. Training options for getting your team onboarded are also available. Finally, the Python client and the REST API are fully documented, making it much easier for a Pipeline TD to work with Kitsu.

shotgrid.title: Kitsu compared to Autodesk Flow
shotgrid.subtitle: When to use Kitsu and Autodesk Flow

sections.title: Target audience
content: The target audience of Shotgrid includes large VFX facilities, such as ILM, Weta, and Disney.
The target audience for Kitsu includes animation and VFX studios with distributed teams and productions involving multiple studios.
Our features and roadmaps are tailored to meet these distinct needs. Therefore, it’s important to consider this aspect when choosing your production management solution.

sections.title: Resource needed
content: ShotGrid is an expansive toolbox. To get started with ShotGrid, you must hire several people dedicated to customizing UIs, and integrating it into your pipeline. You will end up with something tailor-made, but it will require a lot of effort. These developments may also need significant maintenance in the future. Lastly, you will need internal training sessions for your customized version of ShotGrid.

In contrast, Kitsu works great right out of the box. All UIs are designed with ease of use in mind, making it easy to get started. Our dedicated support team is available to assist with setup if needed. However, to fully integrate Kitsu with your pipeline and take advantage of its database, you may need a pipeline TD. While Kitsu provides flexibility to define different workflows, it may not be suitable for projects with highly specialized pipelines.

sections.title: Simplicity vs Comprehensiveness
content: ShotGrid is designed to work on any project at a fine-grain level. It's great at adapting to any situation, but it comes with a lot of complexity. As a result, the added time taken to learn and customize the system may counter the benefits gained from it. Moreover, projects that require this level of specificity are rare.

Kitsu focuses on animation and VFX projects. Through close collaboration with hundreds of studios, we have designed a system that is efficient yet flexible enough to adapt to most situations. Our goal is to ensure that everyone in the studio can use Kitsu from day one. While there may be some very specialized use cases that aren't suitable, you can be confident that everyone in the studio will be comfortable with Kitsu.

sections.title: Security
content: ShotGrid qualifies for many security certifications and although it offers an on-premise installations, there is a lengthy approval process and incredibly high additional cost. Its code is also proprietary, so there is no guarantee that features or functionality might change or break in the future.

Kitsu is open-source and can be fully audited and installed on-premise with very little extra cost. We ensure that your data remains private and secure. We take security very seriously and, while still waiting for certifications, we apply all best practices to keep your data safe.

CGWire engineers have a strong track record in cloud hosting and apply all protocols to ensure the security of your data (HTTPS, strict password management policies, strong SSH key management, background checks, etc.). It is only a matter of time before we qualify for the necessary security certifications.

sections.title: Pricing
content: Kitsu and Shotgrid have similar pricing.
However, our support is recognized for being much more responsive than Autodesk's, and we provide additional assistance for customized installations.
Note that Shotgrid will require to hire several consultants to make it work properly.

sections.title: Documentation
content: Shotgrid provides user documentation for its app and Python client.
Kitsu provides easy-to-follow documentation, a search engine, and tutorial videos. Its Python client and REST API are fully documented, making it much easier for everyone to work with Kitsu.

quote.text: Kitsu has pretty much unified everything and is forcing neater communication.
quote.author: Pete Draper, Head of VFX at Makuta VFX (RRR movie)

panels.title: For Producers
descriptions: The producer has a comprehensive view of the production. They can verify any information from the client or the contractor.

Kitsu provides financial insights into the production. It shows where money is being spent and why. The producer can identify which shots or assets are the most costly, and use charts to always provide an up-to-date overview of the production's progress.
The producer can independently monitor the progress of the show. No one needs to pause their work to provide pictures or previews. They can view the progress of an episode in real-time.

panels.title: For Production Managers
descriptions: As a Production Manager, tracking production costs and knowing the status of reviews and retakes is essential.
Kitsu provides efficient timesheets where you can see the number of hours spent by each artist, per day, per week, or per month for all productions.
For each shot or asset, you can see the overall time spent on it, helping to identify entities that cost too much. You can set estimates for every task and compare them to the time spent.
With the statistics page, you can create efficient production reports. No need to chase down information; it shows you the production progress in real-time.
You don't need to spend time gathering files for the daily or weekly review. With the playlist page, you can create reviews quickly without missing anything.

panels.title: For Directors
descriptions: Directors need an efficient way to review pending tasks and stay aware of production progress. This enables them to react quickly and prevent the team from wasting time due to missed feedback.

With Kitsu's playlist system, the Director can review multiple shots from anywhere, whether it's a few pending reviews or the entire movie. Kitsu includes editing functions like changing the shot order or switching versions on the fly, allowing the Director to be more precise about what they want to see.

panels.title: For Supervisors
descriptions: Supervisors need instant access to information at all times. They don't want to spend time searching for the right spreadsheet or file to comment on.
Fortunately, with Kitsu, everything is in one place. Supervisors don't have to wait for others to know what to do. They always know what to review and which retakes need to be done.
Task assignments, mentions, and comments ensure that information is efficiently sent to the right person. Supervisors have everything at hand to make the right decision.

panels.title: For Artists
descriptions: Artists need quick and easy access to their tasks and a simple way to communicate about their work by posting comments and previews.
When an artist logs in, they can access their to-do list. At a glance, they can see all relevant information about what needs to be done.
All tasks contain detailed metadata, such as due dates, time estimates, priority level, current status, and comment history.

With a single click, the artist opens a comment panel without leaving their to-do list. It's super fast to respond or send a new preview. Through the notification system (in-app, email, or Slack), they know when something happens.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your Feature Film Production
items: Get an overview of the progress of all your sequences
Run full sequence reviews through a single playlist with external collaborators

quote.text: Kitsu is the exact solution we were looking for to manage our students projects.
quote.author: Carlos de Carvalho, Director of studies at Pôle 3D

panels.title: For a Student
descriptions: Students need a central place to collaborate with each other and their teachers. Kitsu provides a dedicated workspace for sharing information.

Kitsu provides a framework for students to organize and receive feedback from their teachers. Thanks to the notification system (in-app, email, or Slack), they are always informed about any required changes.
Your students will learn how to use a production tracker utilized in real studios. They will gain an early understanding of prioritization and the basics of professional communication.

panels.title: For a Teacher
descriptions: Teachers can stay focused on their areas of expertise. They won't miss any requests for feedback or new previews. They will also be able to identify which student groups require assistance.
Movie reviews are seamless thanks to the playlist module, which allows comparing different versions at different stages of production.
Kitsu serves as a dedicated place to store the entire project history, capturing how decisions were made.

panels.title: For an Academic Director
descriptions: Academic Directors can monitor final student projects, easily understand how assignments are progressing, and quickly identify issues.

Academic Directors can quickly determine the status of a project and evaluate the appropriateness of task assignments. Through the schedules, they will have a comprehensive overview of the major milestones of the project.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your Education Program
items: Preparing students for industry-standard production management
Playlist makes reviews easy for teachers
Efficient student interactions with built-in comment system

hero.subtitle: Trailers, Ads, Docs, Music Clips, Youtube
hero.title: Kitsu for your Short Movies

quote.text: Kitsu is a very artist-friendly tool for planning and tracking your project. The UI is clean and easy to understand. We received a lot of positive feedback from the team.
quote.author: Christian Zehetmeier, Head of Production at Woodblock

panels.title: For Production Managers
descriptions: As a Production Manager, you need to track production costs and know what has been reviewed and how many times it required a retake.
Kitsu provides efficient timesheets where you can see the number of hours spent per artist over a day, week, or month. You can access the details by production.
For each shot or asset, you can see the overall time spent on it. This helps identify entities that are too costly. You can set estimates for each task and compare them to the actual time spent.

The statistics page allows you to write your producer report faster. You don't have to chase down information. You can simply report the data and track the progress of the project throughout its lifetime.
You don't need to spend time gathering files for daily or weekly reviews. With the playlist page, you can set up reviews with a single click and ensure nothing is missed.

panels.title: For Directors
descriptions: Directors need an efficient way to review pending tasks and stay informed about production progress. This allows them to react quickly and prevent the team from wasting time due to incorrect directions.

To achieve this, Kitsu provides a playlist system, allowing the Director to review multiple shots consecutively. This can include pending reviews or the entire movie. Kitsu also offers editing functions such as changing the shot order or switching versions on the fly. This enables the Director to be more precise about what they want to see.
The Director can monitor activities via the news feed, allowing for quick reactions when something goes wrong. There is no need to wait until the end of the week to respond.

panels.title: For Supervisors
descriptions: Supervisors work on multiple productions simultaneously. They need to act quickly and stay up to date.
Thanks to its real-time capabilities, Kitsu always displays the latest data. Additionally, dashboards and task lists emphasize the most important information.
Supervisors can save their most-used filters, making it easy for them to find their retakes or pending reviews.
Task assignments, mentions, and comments ensure that information is always sent to the right person, giving supervisors everything they need to make informed decisions.

panels.title: For Artists
descriptions: Artists need quick access to their tasks and a simple way to communicate about their work by posting comments and previews.
When artists log in, they land on their to-do list. At a glance, they see which tasks to work on. Related data is displayed: entity, task type, estimation, due date, and the most recent comment.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your Short Movie production
items: Communicate easily with your Artists and keep the history
Schedule and manage several projects at the same time
Send reviews and final projects through the client gateway

quote.text: When you work on a 52x11' series, you have to deal with an insane amount of deliveries. Fortunately, with Kitsu, everything was running smoothly.
quote.author: Cécile Hergaux, Head of Studio at Cube Creative

panels.title: For Producers
descriptions: The producer has a comprehensive view of the production. They can verify any information from the client or the contractor.

Kitsu allows the producer to see the financial status of the production, including where money is spent and why. They can identify the most costly shots or assets. Thanks to the charts, they always know how the production is progressing.
The producer doesn't depend on others to see the progress of the show. No one has to stop working to provide updates. The producer can independently view the progress of a sequence in real-time.

panels.title: For Production Managers
descriptions: As a Production Manager, you need to track production costs and know what has been reviewed and how many retakes have occurred.
Kitsu provides efficient timesheets where you can see the number of hours spent by each artist per day, week, or month for all productions.
For each shot or asset, you can see the overall time spent on it. This helps identify entities that are too costly. You can set estimates for each task and compare them to the actual time spent.
The statistics page allows you to write your producer report faster. You don't have to chase down information. It shows you the production's progress in real-time.
You don't need to spend time gathering files for daily or weekly reviews. With the playlist page, you can set up reviews quickly and ensure nothing is missed.

panels.title: For Directors
descriptions: Directors have an efficient way to review pending tasks and stay aware of what's happening in production. This allows them to react quickly and avoid the team wasting time due to incorrect directions.

Kitsu provides a playlist system: the Director can review multiple shots consecutively, whether pending reviews or the entire movie. Kitsu includes editing functions such as changing the shot order or switching versions on the fly, allowing the Director to be more precise about what they want to see.

panels.title: For Supervisors
descriptions: Supervisors need instant access to information at all times. They don't want to search for the right spreadsheet or file to comment on.
Fortunately, with Kitsu, everything is in one place. Supervisors don't have to wait for others to know what to do. They always know what to review and which retakes need to be done.
Task assignments, mentions, and comments ensure that information is always sent to the right person efficiently. Ultimately, supervisors have everything at hand to make and share the right decisions.

panels.title: For Artists
descriptions: Artists need quick access to their tasks and a simple way to communicate about their work by posting comments and previews.
When artists log in, they land on their to-do list. At a glance, they see what tasks they need to complete.
All tasks are properly detailed: due date, estimation, priority level, current status, and the latest comment.

With a single click, artists can open a comment panel without leaving their to-do list. It's very fast to respond or send a new preview. Through the notification system (in-app, email, or Slack), they know when something happens.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your TV Series production
items: Get an overview of the progress of all your episodes
Run full episode reviews through a single playlist with external collaborators
Keep track of retake numbers and build report easily

quote.text: Every time I learn about another feature of Kitsu, it becomes a more powerful tool. It's like Kitsu is full of surprises. It's been a robust resource that I know I'll continue to learn, adapt and expand upon, so it always has more to offer!
quote.author: Ariel McKay , Production Assistant at MDHR

panels.title: For Supervisors
descriptions: Supervisors need instant access to information at all times. They don't want to search for the right spreadsheet or file to comment on.
With Kitsu, everything is in one place. Supervisors don't have to wait for others to know what to do. They always know what to review and can easily send their feedback.
With the playlist system, they can review everything in a row. They can do it alone or invite the whole team to the review.
Task assignments, mentions, and comments ensure that information is always sent to the right person efficiently. Ultimately, supervisors have everything at hand to make and share the right decisions.

panels.title: For Artists
descriptions: Artists need quick access to their tasks and a simple way to communicate about their work by posting comments and previews.
Via the Kitsu todo-list, they can report their progress efficiently and push their deliveries. They get timesheets to declare the amount of hours they spent working for your studio.
All tasks are properly detailed. Artists get clear feedback and know when their work is validated.
They have many views to manage their workload: list, kanban and calendar and can see the whole production to understand the context.
Through the notification system (in-app, email, or Slack), they always know when something happens.

panels.title: For Project Managers
descriptions: Kitsu provides efficient task management and scheduling features. It allows you to set proper workloads for every artist and have a global perspective on your project.
For each asset, you can see the overall effort spent on it. This helps identify elements that are too costly. Then, you can access to the whole history and identify bottlenecks.
You can also track the time billed by your freelancers through a simple timesheet system. All the data can be aggregated at week and month level.

reasons.title: Why you should use Kitsu for your video games production
items: Build a library of all your in-game assets and version them
Optimized design for artists to get clear directives and send their deliveries
Collaboration features dedicated to the creative team, Kitsu is like Jira for artists
